### _Washington Post_ : "Chris Van Hollen attacks Donna Edwards in ad"
Desperate to fend off our momentum, our opponent and his allies have launched attacks across the airwaves.
**[Rush a donation towards our $45,000 early vote goal before midnight Wednesday so we can respond to these attacks and make sure every voter knows what's at stake.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff0/767134fb/5c6e99ff/4338e419/205111058/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDExLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160411-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
This is about one thing: distracting everyone from the real issues.
We _should_ be talking about how to give everyone a fair shot in a rigged economy, limiting the influence of special interests like the NRA and Wall Street, and stopping bad trade deals like the TPP. Instead, our opponent has chosen to take the low road -- personal attacks against Donna.
This is a critical moment for our campaign: If we don't respond, we risk falling behind in an election this close.
**Please give every dollar you can right now so we can respond to these attacks, reach every voter, and build the progressive Senate we need to fight for working people:**

subject: Tonight, please, help us reach our biggest day ever!
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c5/2729217781/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Dear Peter, Please help! I have such a smile...we are $3000 shy of our largest contribution day online in this campaign! Supporters -- old and new -- are flocking to help defend us against the false ad below by my primary opponent's ally from DC! This is real -- as is your support! [Please contribute tonight what you ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c4/2729217781/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[will to](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c4/2729217781/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[ exceed the $3000: exceed the most received online this campaign; and exceed the false ad in the number of times our rebuttal will play!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c4/2729217781/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c3/2729217781/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3b1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
Thank you!
Joe

* * *
All,
It's incredible, but the "PolitiFact" that the **Democrat** special interest group cites in its attack ad is about **a vote by a Republican congressman -- cast 14 months after Joe left Congress!**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c3/2729217781/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3b1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
This is unbelievable and it is outrageous. _Citizens United_ has caused so much damage to politicians' integrity that they will say anything. So much so that Democrat power brokers in DC are now not only using corporate contributions to attack Joe, but are also using a Politifact about a vote taken long after Joe left Congress! We are not making this up!
[Please contribute, now, to help by any amount you can.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c4/2729217781/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
Maybe now it becomes obvious why Joe refused the DSCC's and its Senators' offer to accept their direction of "Sestak, whenever I tell you anything, the only answer is to be yes." And maybe now it lends even more meaning to **The Philadelphia Inquirer's** endorsement of Joe yesterday for "his willingness to put principle above party."
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c2/2729217781/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3b2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
[Please contribute right away if you would, $15, $25, $50, $100, $250 to ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c1/2729217781/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[rebut](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c1/2729217781/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[ the ad's ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c1/2729217781/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[falsehoods](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c1/2729217781/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[ -- because principle does matter...particularly as our political establishment has put our nation's character at risk, unfortunately, it seems in both parties.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c1/2729217781/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
\- Team Sestak

* * *
Peter,
Tomorrow, an outside special interest group supporting Joe's primary election opponent begins airing a negative ad falsely attacking Joe.
Despite the fact that Congressman Sestak was, is, and will always be a proven fighter for preserving and expanding Social Security and Medicare, **this outside interest group said it is putting up a $1 million TV ad making false claims that have already been proven inaccurate by independent fact-checkers. **
[Please help Joe push back with a rebuttal ad - based on the true facts listed below - by directly funding our response ad with $10, $25, $100, whatever you can do now, please... as this takes funds away from our positive ads!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222c0/2729217781/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p3&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222cf/2729217781/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3b3&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
_These are the facts:_
* **" Not ****accurate** " said ABC's WTAE Action News 4 in Pittsburgh after "digging into the truth behind the claims" about Joe's record on Social Security and Medicare.
* WGAL in Lancaster **agreed with ABC 's assessment that the claims are false.**
* The _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ said the allegation was **" plainly misleading."**
* In fact, the _Post-Gazette_ said **" Mr. Sestak's answer did not [even] mention Social Security"** as the group claims it did.
* And Philadelphia NPR affiliate WHYY agreed with the _Post-Gazette_ , finding that** "Sestak didn't actually talk about Social Security in the interview in question."**

Peter, again, please help Joe push back as we must unfortunately take funds from our positive ads to now counter the negative one that is falsely misrepresenting Joe's integrity of service to the people of Pennsylvania. [We ask you to chip in the maximum amount you are able so that we can respond tomorrow!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222ce/2729217781/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3p4&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171990b/3476a20e/d8b8929/274222cd/2729217781/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB3b4&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
Warmly,
Team Sestak

name: John Kasich
subject: Two paths
body:
I spoke this morning about the choice the Republican Party has
before us. We have two paths ahead.

Peter, I spoke this morning
about the choice the Republican Party has before us.

We have two paths:

One is espoused by the other
candidates - it's riddled with negativity about America...it
drags us into a ditch and it divides us.

The other path is one that I've
focused my entire campaign on. It's one that offers American
families a positive vision for the future of our country.

Our challenges are real but we
can overcome them together.

America's best days are ahead.

Peter, join me.

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Nearly every national poll shows
that I am the ONLY Republican candidate who can defeat Hillary
Clinton. If Cruz/Trump are the nominees, their negative messages
about America will not only lose to Hillary but also threaten our
majority in the U.S. Senate and to shift the balance of the
Supreme Court.

We cannot allow this to happen.

It's time for the Republican
Party to choose the right path.

Thank you for your support.

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate

for America

name: Katie McGinty
subject: a top priority (Add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4339288729974734848/4410173024846741504?code=McGinty)
---
Friend -- Men in Pennsylvania and across our country don't work 21% harder than women do. So why do men make 21% more than their female colleagues?

It's 2016, we have a woman running for the highest office in the United States and there are female leaders in politics, business, education and technology. Yet from a single mom working to put food on her family's table to a CEO of a Fortune 500 company, there is still a struggle for women to be paid the same as their male counterparts. This shouldn't even be a debate.

The long-term economic consequences from the gender wage gap are devastating for families across this country, yet Republicans like Pat Toomey have repeatedly blocked legislation that would ensure women receive equal pay for equal work.

[**That 's frankly unacceptable, friend. Will you stand with me and demand Republicans in Congress put an end to gender discrimination in pay?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4339288729974734848/4410173024846741504?code=McGinty)

Based on his voting history, Pat Toomey seems to think the wage gap is just fine -- he's voted _FIVE TIMES_ against the Paycheck Fairness Act.

As your senator, closing the gender wage gap will be among my top priorities. It's about basic fairness, and ensuring economic security for women and their families.

[**Add your name if you agree that Republicans in Congress need to stop obstructing efforts to close the wage gap.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4339288729974734848/4410173024846741504?code=McGinty)

Thank you,

Katie

Based on his voting history, Pat Toomey seems to think the wage gap is just fine -- he's voted FIVE TIMES against the Paycheck Fairness Act. As your senator, closing the gender wage gap will be among my top priorities. It's about basic fairness, and ensuring economic security for women and their families. Thank you, Katie | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: A message to you from Wall Street
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
New York has enthusiastically welcomed Bernie back to his childhood home with open arms. Well, most of New York. There's one very small part of the state that isn't so excited to see him return.
Can you guess where?
An article titled "Jamie Dimon's not-so-subtle warning for Bernie Sanders" welcomed our campaign to New York with this message from the **Wall Street CEO: "Jamie Dimon waved a placard at Bernie Sanders in his annual shareholders letteron Wednesday. It says, in effect: 'Don't Bite the Hand That Feeds Us.'"**
Here's the truth: from day one, Wall Street has contributed more than $21 million to Hillary Clinton's campaign and super PACs, and they are going to do everything they can to stop us in New York. Because if we can win there, we're going to win everywhere. **The stakes are high in these next two weeks, and that 's why we have to ask:**
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign today. If everyone who has signed up to support this campaign renewed their commitment with a contribution, we will have the resources we need to beat Wall Street in the New York primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-message-from-wall-street?refcode=em160412-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-message-from-wall-street?refcode=em160412-full-nd")
In less than one year, our campaign has received more individual contributions than Barack Obama did during the entirety of his historic 2008 campaign -- almost 7 million so far! But we cannot afford to stop now, and it is how we respond in this moment that could be the difference between victory and defeat for our political revolution. That's why your contribution is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-message-from-wall-street?refcode=em160412-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-message-from-wall-street?refcode=em160412-full-nd")**

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 79 cents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae232a/738133e4/35c3d450/7f823258/787744817/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160412")
---
Friends,

Today is Equal Pay Day. Women have to work the entirety of 2015 and up to today in 2016 to earn what men did in 2015 alone. All because they earn just 79 cents for every dollar that men make.

It makes no sense. Yet, Republicans in Congress have successfully blocked solutions to this inequality for YEARS.

[_**On this Equal Pay Day, will you stand with me against obstructionist Republicans and show that you are fighting for equal pay? Add your name.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae232a/738133e4/35c3d450/7f823258/787744817/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160412")

Twenty-one cents less may not seem like much on its own. But it adds up. Fast.

The median annual earnings for a woman working full-time, year round was $39,621. For a man, it was $50,383. That's a difference of more than $10,700 _a year_.

Imagine how many mortgage payments, car payments, or tuition payments you can make with an extra $10,000 a year. Think of how many months of groceries that is, or fill-ups at the gas pump, or deposits in the kids' college savings accounts.

Because that's what this issue really comes down to -- financial stability for hardworking, middle class families everywhere.

I'm proud to be a co-sponsor of the Paycheck Fairness Act, which would make it easier for women who fall victim to pay discrimination to have their day in court. Unfortunately, Republicans have spent YEARS blocking this commonsense legislation and, for the life of me, I can't tell you why. I can tell you I won't stop working until the gender pay gap is closed for good -- in Florida and across the country.

[_**I am committed to achieving equal pay. Show that you are too by adding your name to mine >>**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae232a/738133e4/35c3d450/7f823258/787744817/VEsF/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160412")

I won't stop working until the pay gap is a thing of the past.

Thank you for your support.

Patrick Murphy

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae232a/738133e4/35c3d450/7f823259/787744817/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

Friend --

Two weeks from today, voters in Pennsylvania head to the polls and cast their ballots to decide who will take on Pat Toomey this November.

The latest from _Harper Polling_ shows that we've jumped **14 points** since March 1st. Momentum is on our side, but we've still got a gap to close before Primary Day.

**If you 're ready for new leadership in Washington and a Senator who will put you first every single time, I need your support right now. [Make a contribution so we can reach out to the remaining undecided voters and win our primary in two weeks.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2572041251108945920/5203650984194080768?refcode=e20160412.3&refcode2=e20160412.3nd&amount=25)**

As the ninth of ten kids of two working parents, I know the difficulty of stretching a paycheck to make ends meet. As your next U.S. Senator, I'll be a champion for hardworking families -- fighting to increase the minimum wage and create good-paying jobs here in Pennsylvania and across the country -- to ensure everyone has a fair shot of achieving the American Dream.

I'm running for U.S. Senate because Pennsylvania and America need new leadership. We can and will defeat Toomey this fall and take back the Senate for Democrats, but we've got an important primary first.

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: Two weeks
body:
#
Bernie Supporter -
**Maryland's primary election is two weeks from today.** We're still down in the polls, but momentum is on our side - and with your help we might just be able to pull off a big win.
So now's the time to step up our efforts, and talking to voters about Bernie is how we win elections. The unique strength of our campaign is **you** - the volunteers and supporters who have gotten us from being an afterthought in the polls, to within reach of the nomination.
**Can we count on you to keep powering the political revolution forward this week?**
**[Dial for Bernie - Rockville Phonebank:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44wzm)
Wednesday, April 13th in Rockville **
**[Phone Bank for Bernie:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44jzl)
Thursday, April 14th in Silver Spring **
**[Dial for Bernie - Rockville Phonebank:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44w3z)
Friday, April 15th in Rockville **
**[Wheaton Spanish Language Canvass:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44rt5)
Saturday, April 16th in Silver Spring **
**You can also[help us find and turn out Bernie's supporters in Maryland by phonebanking from home](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/mdphonebank/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/mdphonebank/"). **
With resounding victories in eight out of the last nine contests, the race is shifting in our favor. We're working very hard right now for a game-changing victory in New York - and then a win in Maryland will help us continue closing the gap in delegates all the way through California on June 7th.
**But we need your help to make that happen.** So please step up and volunteer some of your time this week to help push Bernie over the top in Maryland.
When people stand together, there is nothing that cannot be accomplished.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
